overall.description: A first-person exploration of a post-industrial wasteland environment from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring derelict oil rigs, corrugated metal shacks, burning gas flares, and abandoned vehicles scattered through muddy terrain. The camera moves steadily through the polluted landscape with a distant city skyline visible through the haze.

The camera moves forward past utility poles and approaches weathered corrugated metal shacks, transitioning from dry ground into a muddy, debris-filled area with large industrial pipes visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial wasteland that transitions from dry dirt paths into a flooded, debris-strewn graveyard of machinery. It begins by moving forward past utility poles and weathered corrugated metal shacks, gradually shifting from dry ground into a muddy area dominated by large industrial pipes. As the camera pushes through knee-deep muddy water, the perspective tilts upward to reveal a massive burning gas flare towering against an overcast sky beside collapsed metal structures. The scene then glides through oily water past burning tires, moving toward the wreckage of a red truck cab and an overturned PETROCHEM tanker. Finally, the camera focuses on the flooded debris and burning remnants while the gas flare remains a distant glow to the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded industrial graveyard that shifts from a wide view of a distant skyline to an intimate exploration of derelict camp structures. It begins by circling a burning gas flare, revealing a futuristic city on the horizon as a PETROCHEM tanker slides across the frame amidst collapsed trailers and metal debris. As the camera pushes deeper into the wreckage, the distant city disappears from view and the gas flare becomes a dramatic silhouette backlit by the sun against a smoky sky. The scene then shifts focus toward the immediate industrial decay, moving past towering oil rigs before finally approaching an intact corrugated metal shack and its wooden platforms within the muddy camp.
